task_completion.description: Navigate to the Receipts module and open the New Receipt form
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Manager.io interface with the 'Receipts' section active and a 'New Receipt' form opened.
Look at the 'Date' field in the receipt form; it should display '2024-03-15'.

task_completion.description: Select 'Cash on Hand' as the bank/cash account
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Received in' or 'Bank/Cash account' dropdown/field; it should be set to 'Cash on Hand'.

task_completion.description: Set the payer to Ernst Handel
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Payer' field; it should display 'Ernst Handel'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct description for the receipt
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Description' field; it should contain the text 'Wire transfer - invoice settlement'.

task_completion.description: Select Accounts receivable and the customer Ernst Handel
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the line item section; the 'Account' should be set to 'Accounts receivable' and the specific customer 'Ernst Handel' should be selected.

task_completion.description: Enter the amount of 3,500.00 and save the receipt
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the line item 'Amount' field (should be 3,500.00). The final screenshots should show the receipt has been successfully created (e.g., a view of the saved receipt or it appearing in the Receipts list).

integrity.description: Agent used the Manager.io web interface to create the receipt
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the Manager.io web interface is visible in the browser, with no terminal windows or API scripts used to inject data.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application form
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the data is entered into the actual Manager.io form fields, not a notepad, text editor, or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Agent actually saved the receipt rather than just filling out the form
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the 'Create' or 'Save' button was clicked, resulting in a confirmation screen, a view of the finalized receipt, or the receipt appearing in the main Receipts list.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Task requires creating a new receipt in Manager.io. Verified parameters: Module = Receipts, Date = 2024-03-15, Payer = Ernst Handel, Bank Account = Cash on Hand, Description = Wire transfer - invoice settlement, Account = Accounts receivable (Customer: Ernst Handel), Amount = 3500.00.
